description: Analyze the car maintenance log to calculate upcoming service needs and total costs. Complete the dataset by filling missing information, implementing formulas to determine miles until the next service, and applying conditional formatting to highlight overdue items. Save the final report to /home/ga/Documents/car_maintenance_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have inherited a car maintenance log from the previous owner with incomplete data. Current mileage is 47,500 miles. Fill missing mileage values, add formulas to calculate next service due and miles until next service, apply conditional formatting to highlight overdue services (red) and due soon (yellow), and calculate total maintenance costs.
